commands.review_summary:
The branch changes doctor legacy plugin dependency cleanup to filter cleanup targets by kind, name, root, and realpath, avoid out-of-root symlink traversal, and add regression tests for escaped or symlinked cleanup candidates.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main collects env/plugin-derived cleanup targets and recursively removes existing targets, while the PR tests cover escaped paths and symlink roots. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
